JUDGE DOMINIC BANDUCCI C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFTS. PLTF IN PRO PER. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AGAINST THE DEFTS, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWARDS, MITCHELL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN NESS #309, SF, CA 94110 $2,210.00 RENT, $682.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,892.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
